name: agent-runtime-sidecar-poc
description: TypeScript POC framework for Agent Runtime Sidecar central service and sidecar daemon.

scripts.test: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist-tests', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test --test-force-exit "dist-tests/tests/**/*.test.js" "dist-tests/sdk/tests/**/*.test.js"
